rationale: The citing paper explicitly states it "extends prior research showing that choices can deplete self-regulatory resources," and its research gap is to identify which choice features drive that depletion—an agenda that closely matches the cited paper’s core contribution on resource depletion in consumer choice. Given the strong construct overlap (executive resource depletion in choice) and the direct DOI match, this looks like a likely foundational/theory-source citation rather than an incidental mention.
